title: Auto Start User App
description: Enables/Disables the Auto start for User App

command.description: The value for the key command must be autostart_user_app

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

payload.title: set_autostartUserapp
payload.description: configure auto start settings for userapp

appname.description: Application name. For REST, the application is identified by the appname path parameter; for MQTT, the application is identified by the appname payload field.

autostart.description: Whether the application should start automatically when the reader starts.
